seoTitle: Jandakot vs Jane Brook — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Jandakot and Jane Brook. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Jandakot vs Jane Brook: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jandakot and Jane Brook.
heading: Jandakot vs Jane Brook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jandakot, Western Australia and Jane Brook, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jane Brook has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Jandakot (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jandakot or Jane Brook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jandakot has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Jane Brook scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jandakot scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Jane Brook scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jandakot or Jane Brook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jane Brook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
